title: feat: pin Hugging Face model revision for NLP analysis
body:
This PR pins the Hugging Face model and tokenizer to a specific revision (commit hash) to avoid unexpected breakages from remote updates.

### Changes:
- Added `nlp_model_revision` field to `AnalysisConfig` in `src/utils/config.py`.
- Updated `_load_analysis_config` to load `NLP_MODEL_REVISION` from env vars, defaulting to a stable hash for `distilbert-base-uncased`.
- Updated `NLPThreatAnalyzer._initialize_model` to use the pinned revision.
- Added `NLP_MODEL_REVISION` to `.env.example`.
- Updated test suite to support the new config field.

Verified with custom test scripts and existing test suite.
head: pin-nlp-revision
